name: sd-pos
description: SD POS — smart Point of Sale system with WhatsApp invoicing & AI sales assistant

scripts.postinstall: node -e "if(!process.env.PUPPETEER_SKIP_DOWNLOAD && !process.env.PUPPETEER_EXECUTABLE_PATH && !process.env.GOOGLE_CHROME_BIN){try{require('child_process').execSync('npx puppeteer browsers install chrome',{stdio:'inherit'})}catch(e){console.log('Chrome auto-install failed — set PUPPETEER_EXECUTABLE_PATH manually')}}"
